历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 3186, based solely on 2025 data; the 2025 Physics Category enrollment plan is 2 students, expanding to 6 in 2026, an increase of 200%. Such a significant expansion typically causes a noticeable backward shift in admission rankings, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; the main ranking of the Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 19th (Beijing Normal University), with rankings stable around 19th in recent years, indicating a very high school level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal for the admission cutoff line in Jiangxi, but it was a low-attention issue with limited impact on Shanxi; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, etc. The Zhuhai Campus enrolls in Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), corresponding to Mathematics A and Physics A-, indicating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics (including Artificial Intelligence, Data Science) corresponds to the Computer/AI category, with a 2024 major popularity rating of recommended; in 2026, there are approximately 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; 2026; the Zhuhai Campus is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, not a university in Shanxi Province, but as a 985 campus, it has strong appeal to Shanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan expanding from 2 to 6 students (a 200% increase), a 3.4% decrease in Physics Category examinees, high popularity of Mathematics/AI majors, and neutral school reputation, and taking into account that major popularity partially offsets the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6809, with a range of 6309-7309.
